name: repository-report
description: Activates only on explicit repository report requests and generates a fixed 7-section Executive-Technical Repository Report.

sections.scope: Executive summary, overview, structure, branches, collaboration, dependencies, architecture, and CI/CD
sections.exclusions: Do not turn the report into a deep audit unless explicitly requested
sections.classification: Separate primary vs secondary branches; never label a primary branch obsolete
sections.output: Markdown document in docs with date and fixed 7-section structure
